title: Als Susan Sontag im Publikum saß
original_title: Als Susan Sontag im Publikum saß
overview: The film revolves around the development of the women's movement. Actors come together on stage and debate topics such as feminism, sexuality, gender performances, power structures, and activism, commenting on their own words. The film also provides insights behind the scenes and creates a fluid transition between the past and the present.
